title: haplophyllum viridulum
intro: Haplophyllum viridulum, also known as green spurge or green haplophyllum, is a flowering plant in the Rutaceae family native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Haplophyllum viridulum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and exhibit immunomodulatory effects. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusions or decoctions of the leaves, flowers, and roots, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
